plates.title: Mateo St at 6th — Arts District — Dawn Urban
plates.description: Dawn urban plate along Mateo St at 6th — Arts District, Los Angeles. 148s of pro-stitched 360×180 coverage at an average 7.7 mph, passing traffic light, street signs, speed limit sign, bridge arches. Cloudy conditions, captured on the Spheris 9-camera array with full sky tier for reflections and LED-dome work.

media.masterFormat: ProRes 4444 12-bit equirect · pro stitch on delivery
